title: pinellia fornicata
intro: Pinellia fornicata, also known as "ban xia" in Chinese, is a type of plant belonging to the Arum family and is native to China, Japan, and Korea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its diuretic, expectorant, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Pinellia fornicata include the relief of coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Pinellia fornicata is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and can also be dried and used in soups and stews.
